title: ilex × koehneana
intro: Ilex × koehneana is a hybrid plant resulting from the cross between Ilex aquifolium and Ilex perado, known for its unique characteristics and properties. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Ilex × koehneana include potential treatments for various conditions such as fever, arthritis, and digestive issues, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Ilex × koehneana include infusions, decoctions, and extracts that can be used in traditional medicine, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
